basic_details.job_title: DRDO NMRL Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Naval Materials Research Laboratory (DRDO NMRL) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 20 Paid Internship Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 25 years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Pursuing Graduates in Engineering with a minimum CGPA of 7.0 in all previous semesters, Pursuing Post Graduate in Science with minimum 65% marks in the 1st year exam, Student must be enrolled for full time course from a AICTE/UGC approved College/University

selection_process: Merit based on marks scored in previous exams Online interview / interaction
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO NMRL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
